- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project: React frontend for StyleMate AI fashion assistant with image upload and prediction display.

	Scaffolded React project using Vite in frontend/ directory.

	Modified App.jsx for image upload and API integration. Updated CSS for styling. Changed title to StyleMate.

	No extensions needed for Vite project.

	Dependencies installed via npm during scaffolding.

	Development server started with npm run dev.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Frontend running on http://localhost:5174/

	Updated README.md with project description and usage instructions.

- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
